title: Addis Premium Soft touch 6 Compartment Cutlery Drawer Organiser Tray, Black & Grey 6 Sections
features: Ideal 6 compartment cutlery tray perfect for neatly separating all your cutlery kitchen tools and utensils
Fits most kitchen office drawers with soft touch lining and feet. Providing anti slip cushioning and a smooth feel
Also ideal for bathroom, office supplies, cosmetics or dressing table, can be used to organise hair accessories or school equipment
Product dimensions w33 x d40.5 x 4.5cm (13" x 16" x 2 inches) - Available in a choice of colours; Easy wipe clean
Addis - part of the home since 1780 - Made for Life
description: From the manufacturer Made For Life Addis part of the home since 1780, based in UK. Addis has a 240+ year old history of design, manufacturing and supplying of housewares. The Addis brand still stands today - as it has for previous generations - for value and quality. 6 Compartments This drawer organiser has 6 compartments which is ideal for allowing you to nearly separate your cutlery/utensils. Fits Inside Most Drawers This drawer organiser fits neatly into most drawers providing the perfect organising tool. With rubberised bottom and base this drawer organisers doesn't move around in your drawers and allows the cutlery to stick. Dimensions H4.5cm X W33cm X D40.5cm
